scripts.ship-it:
npm run validate && npm run build && git add . && node -e "const m=process.argv[1]; if(m){ const s=(c)=>require('child_process').execSync(c,{stdio:'inherit'}); s('git commit -m '+JSON.stringify(m)); s('git push origin main'); }else{ console.log('
[SHIP-IT] No message provided. Falling back to diff context...
'); require('child_process').execSync('npm run gen-commit',{stdio:'inherit'}); console.log('
Use: npm run ship-it -- "your message"'); }" --
scripts.gen-commit: git diff --staged --quiet && git diff || git diff --staged
